guide.xpmagic.title: XPMagic
guide.xpmagic.body.storage: The XP Keeping Machine bottles a player's experience. It stores as much as the carrier can hold (powder, crystal or pearl). It needs fuel and a bound Player Key to run. While the key's owner is online, the machine drains their XP and makes an XP Cocktail. Drinking the cocktail returns the XP.
guide.xpmagic.body.powder: Memory Powder (cap 10) is the basic XP store. The Powder Separator splits it into coarse (5), medium (2) and fine (1) fractions. The Separator needs a Vibration Stand placed beneath it. The Stand consumes fuel (load it by right-click or hopper) and switches on with a redstone signal. The Powder Mixer recombines fractions: coarse gives -25% to the mix's capacity, fine +25%. Catalysts can raise it. The total specific capacity can't exceed 20.
guide.xpmagic.body.crystals: An explosion fuses Memory Powder into a Memory Crystal (cap 20 + a bonus). A lightning strike adds 10 capacity per hit, but the total can't exceed 40. An anvil shatters it back into powder (lossy). In soul fire the crystal burns down into a Time Crystal — a tough crystal for armor and tools. A block of Time Crystals can be cut on a stonecutter into wafers and rods.
guide.xpmagic.body.pearl: The Memory Pearl (cap 40) is the largest store. It's dropped by an enderman killed with a memory-crystal weapon enchanted with Saturation. On an anvil the pearl can be fed: Vindictive Flesh, Nostalgic Coal and Fruit of Knowledge each work, and every kind of feed can add up to 20 capacity.
guide.xpmagic.body.gear: Memory Crystal tools: +25% damage over diamond tier, and fireproof. Sword, pickaxe, axe and shovel evolve from use (combat or mining). Time Crystal armor is fireproof.
guide.xpmagic.body.tree: Using a memory-crystal hoe enchanted with Saturation lets you till Truth Farmland — only there does the Grain of Truth sprout. Grain → Knowledge Sapling → Tree of Knowledge → Fruit of Knowledge.
guide.xpmagic.body.chips: Start with a Processing Chip and a Memory Chip — machines and the key are crafted from them. Make an XP Keeping Machine and some Memory Powder, then follow the chapters of this book. Good luck!
